text: This is it, native PCVR on MacOS! The OpenXR SDK can be compiled on MacOS, So I implemented a runtime and a streaming app. Godot supports OpenXR on MacOS so I use it to test my integration. Unity could work too and of course native C++. 1/x https://t.co/i0EGxWeFSk
author: cyannick

text:
This is not a video.

It’s a walkable photorealistic Gaussian Splat running live in your browser.

Vibe-coded camera + post effects.
50 spatial audio sources.
Multiplayer avatars.

Step inside the space: https://t.co/3IlOa1pCOl

text:
Experimenting with generating WebXR scenes in VR. This demo uses Grok's @xai API to create @threejs scenes on the fly. 

It takes a vague prompt like "VR shooting game," runs it through the reasoning model to flesh out the details then hands that to a code-gen model, uploads to https://t.co/vOBmtE8Aef

text:
Hey everyone, thanks for the support. Some news:
- Confirmed Unity works, it requires more work, but I made it work
- Unreal will be hard because the OpenXR plugin doesn't support Macos and Metal or Vulkan with MoltenVK
- USB is coming too
- Conformance tests are integrated https://t.co/afOgRufdx4
